title: carex calcifugens
intro: Carex calcifugens, also known as mountain king fern, is a species of flowering plant in the sedge family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Carex calcifugens include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting immune function. Carex calcifugens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
